hook.name: LendingHookV2
hook.description: A Uniswap v4 hook implementing a range-aware lending AMM (lo0p protocol) that seeds the pool with single-sided LOOP token liquidity across multiple price bands, skims a fixed 1% fee on all swaps via BeforeSwapDelta/AfterSwapDelta, and enforces a same-block liquidation lockout. Supports borrow, repay, and liquidation operations tied to concentrated liquidity bands.
